data.title: Guardant Health’s InfinityAI Real-World Evidence Supports Approval of ENHERTU® for Previously Treated Patients with HER2-Positive Metastatic Solid Tumors in Japan
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Guardant Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GH), a prominent precision oncology firm, revealed that real-world evidence from Guardant’s InfinityAI aided in the approval of ENHERTU® (trastuzumab deruxtecan) by Daiichi Sankyo (TSE:4568) in Japan. This approval is for treating patients with HER2-positive (HER2 [ERBB2] gene amplification or immunohistochemistry [IHC] 3+) advanced or recurrent solid cancers refractory or intolerant to prior anti-HER2 therapy.

data.title: Hyperlink InfoSystem Named a Top Mobile App Development Company in India 2026 by TopSoftwareCompanies.co
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in New York and Los Angeles, a growing trend in the business world is the shift towards prioritizing mobile strategies to maintain competitiveness and relevance in the digital age. Companies of all sizes, from small startups to large corporations, are recognizing the need to focus on mobile applications. This approach is seen as essential for meeting the demands of consumers in an evolving market.

data.title: PMI U.S. BRINGS TECHNOVATION TO WASHINGTON D.C.
data.description: Philip Morris International (PMI) is launching Technovation, its global science and innovation platform, in the United States. The aim is to bring leaders together to drive progress towards a smoke-free future. This initiative was announced on March 30, 2026, and PMI is listed on the NYSE as PM. The platform will focus on new technologies and research to support this goal.

data.title: Westinghouse Celebrates Record-breaking 80 Years of Nuclear Fuel Manufacture at Springfields
data.description: A notable achievement was recently celebrated at the Westinghouse Springfields site in Lancashire, UK, as it holds the title of being the oldest uninterrupted nuclear fuel manufacturing facility worldwide. Its operations began under an official license on March 28, 1946. Initially selected by the UK Government for nuclear fuel production for the earliest global civil nuclear power plants, including the Magnox and Advanced Gas Reactors (AGR) reactors. Over a span of 80 years, the Springfields facility has been pivotal in the development and supply of nuclear fuel, playing a vital role in the energy sector's evolution.

data.title: Altus Power Completes Solar Project at San Manuel Landing in San Bernardino, California
data.description: Altus Power, a prominent commercial-scale energy company, has revealed the successful deployment and launch of a rooftop solar initiative at San Manuel Landing in San Bernardino, California. This project, developed in collaboration with Trammell Crow Company and the Yuhaaviatam of San Manuel Nation (YSMN), is situated at a cutting-edge 1.1 million square foot Class-A industrial logistics hub. Through extended contracts, Altus Power is leasing the rooftop space for this solar installation.
SCIENTURE releases 2025 financial results, offers business update.

data.title: PINE BLUFF WINS NATIONAL COMPETITIVE T-MOBILE GRANT FOR "BLUES JUNCTION" LANDMARK MONUMENT
data.description: Pine Bluff, Arkansas has been chosen as one of only 25 recipients out of 900 applicants to host a monument commemorating the Delta Blues heritage. The 20-foot tall landmark will pay tribute to J. Mayo "Ink" Williams, a member of the Blues Hall of Fame. It will be located at the intersection of the National Blues and Heritage Tourism Corridors in Pine Bluff. The announcement was made on March 30, 2026.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From TD Synnex Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: TD Synnex Corporation (SNX) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter earnings on March 31. Analysts are predicting earnings of $3.31 per share for this quarter, an increase from the previous year's $2.80 per share. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $15.65 billion, up from the $14.53 billion reported last year. With TD Synnex's current annual dividend yield sitting at 1.22%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 48 cents per share ($1.92 annually), investors may be considering potential gains from dividends. To earn $500 per month from TD Synnex, an investor would need to target $6,000 annually ($500 x 12 months) and divide this by the $1.92 dividend, resulting in the need for 3,125 shares. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: S4 Capital's Monks Appoints Alex Oberberg as CRO, EMEA to Drive Commercial Orchestration
data.description: Alex Oberberg, former leader at PIF and Microsoft, has been chosen as the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) for EMEA at Monks, a division of S4 Capital plc. This move aims to drive rapid growth and streamline the consumer experience in the current era. The announcement was made in London on March 30, 2026.

data.title: IPVanish Launches Full-Scale Digital Security, Continuing Expansion Beyond VPN Service With Threat Protection Pro
data.description: In New York, IPVanish unveiled a new feature called Threat Protection Pro for Windows and macOS, aimed at offering continuous digital security. This feature, utilizing VIPRE® cybersecurity technology with 25+ years of experience, enhances the IPVanish app to provide sophisticated protection against harmful online threats.

data.title: HistoSonics Treats First Patients Evaluating the Edison® Histotripsy System for the Treatment of Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia (BPH)
data.description: Minneapolis-based HistoSonics has successfully treated its initial patients in a study examining the effectiveness of the Edison® Histotripsy System in managing Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia (BPH). This medical development marks a significant milestone for the company, showcasing its dedication to providing innovative solutions for common health conditions. The trial, aimed at evaluating the system's potential in BPH treatment, is a crucial step towards potentially offering a new approach for the estimated millions of individuals globally affected by this condition.

data.title: Spektrum Labs Named Winner of the 2026 SC Award for Best Emerging Technology
data.description: In Carmel, Indiana on March 30, 2026, Spektrum Labs, a top provider of AI-driven cyber resilience solutions, revealed that its Spektrum Fusion platform has secured victory in the Best Emerging Technology division of the prestigious 2026 SC Awards. This marks the 29th year of the SC Awards, which acknowledge outstanding contributions in cybersecurity.

data.title: Tech Soft 3D Announces Full Launch of HOOPS AI, Adding Embeddings & Linux Support
data.description: In Bend, Oregon, Tech Soft 3D, a prominent provider of engineering software development toolkits, has launched HOOPS AI, a cutting-edge framework designed to leverage AI and machine learning specifically for CAD data. This official release comes after a beta program that included over 30 companies. HOOPS AI is now widely available to assist software vendors and engineers in industries such as PLM, MES, CAM, manufacturing, and any other teams dealing with intricate 3D datasets.

data.title: Travel Chaos Drives Shift to Private Flights: FlyUSA Reports
data.description: With TSA and FAA restrictions tightening and operational challenges increasing, the private aviation sector is quickly adjusting. Barry Shevlin from FlyUSA reveals the growing trend of more passengers opting for private aviation due to its improved reliability and control. This shift is particularly notable in Tampa, Florida, as of March 30, 2026, with a significant rise in private flights. The industry is witnessing a surge in demand for private aviation services, showcasing the appeal of this mode of travel amid current constraints and bottlenecks in commercial air travel.

data.title: Teledyne to Deliver Advanced Detectors for the Lazuli Space Observatory, Accelerating Next-Generation, Open-Access Astronomy
data.description: Teledyne Space Imaging, a division of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), has secured a contract from Schmidt Sciences to provide cutting-edge near-infrared (NIR) H4RG-10 flight focal plane arrays (FPAs) and tailored electronics for incorporation into the Integral Field Spectrograph at the innovative Lazuli Space Observatory. As a component of the Eric and Wendy Schmidt Observatory System, Lazuli seeks to revolutionize unrestricted astronomy by broadening scientific access.

data.title: Kidneylink Leads the Industry as #1 in Value-Based Kidney Care Savings
data.description: In 2024, the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Innovation (CMMI) released the results of the Kidney Care Choices (KCC) Model, showing significant cost reductions and high-quality, patient-centered care. This announcement was made in Plano, Texas, on March 30, 2026. The results showcased unmatched success with the KCC Model, highlighting the impressive outcomes achieved during that year. Kidneylink, a national organization, played a key role in these positive results by contributing to the improved care and cost savings demonstrated in the report. The data presented by CMMI emphasized the effectiveness of the KCC Model in delivering high-quality healthcare while reducing expenses, marking a noteworthy achievement in the healthcare industry for that year.

data.title: AI Guardrails by Zapier Gives Teams Inline Safety Checks for Every AI-Powered Workflow
data.description: In San Francisco, Zapier unveiled "AI Guardrails," a new feature integrated into automated workflows to enhance safety measures. This innovative tool enables teams to identify and prevent risks like sharing personally identifiable information (PII), spotting prompt injection attempts, and detecting toxic content. By implementing AI Guardrails within their systems, companies can avoid potential data breaches or harmful outcomes before the AI processes reach critical platforms such as CRMs, databases, or customer communication channels. This advancement comes as more businesses integrate AI technology into their daily operations to streamline processes and enhance efficiency.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Kick Off Week In Green On Options-Expiry Relief Rally
data.description: Bitcoin's value has increased by approximately 1.5% to $67,367.79 after reaching a low of $65,000 over the weekend. A relief rally from options expiry and a broader market rebound contributed to this upturn. Within the last 24 hours, liquidations in the cryptocurrency market amounted to $366.35 million. Bitcoin ETFs experienced a total outflow of $225.5 million, while Ethereum ETFs reported $48.5 million in net outflows on Friday. Other crypto assets include Ethereum at $2,049.82, Solana at $83.71, XRP at $1.34, Dogecoin at $0.09230, and Shiba Inu at $0.00056003. The overall market capitalization of meme coins increased by 1.4%. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
